export class OpponentStatsParser{constructor(){this._userId=0;this._username='';this._figure='';this._health=0;this._maxHealth=0;this._energy=0;this._maxEnergy=0;this._hunger=0;this._maxHunger=0;this._aggressionMs=0;this._xp=0;this._maxXP=0;this._strength=0;this._level=0;this._points=0;this._stamina=0;this._hungerLevel=0;this._gatheringLevel=0;this._defense=0;this._punchesThrown=0;this._punchesLanded=0;this._damageDealt=0;this._damageReceived=0;this._shiftsWorked=0;this._kills=0;this._deaths=0;this._arrests=0;this._isAggressive=false;this._gangName='';this._healthLevel=0;this._jobTitle='';this._corporationName='';this._corporationIconUrl='';this._gangId=0;this._gangIconKey='';this._gangPrimaryColor='';this._gangSecondaryColor='';}flush(){return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._userId=wrapper.readInt();this._username=wrapper.readString();this._figure=wrapper.readString();this._health=wrapper.readInt();this._maxHealth=wrapper.readInt();this._energy=wrapper.readInt();this._maxEnergy=wrapper.readInt();this._hunger=wrapper.readInt();this._maxHunger=wrapper.readInt();this._aggressionMs=wrapper.readInt();this._xp=wrapper.readInt();this._maxXP=wrapper.readInt();this._strength=wrapper.readInt();this._level=wrapper.readInt();this._points=wrapper.readInt();this._stamina=wrapper.readInt();this._hungerLevel=wrapper.readInt();this._gatheringLevel=wrapper.readInt();this._defense=wrapper.readInt();this._punchesThrown=wrapper.readInt();this._punchesLanded=wrapper.readInt();this._damageDealt=wrapper.readInt();this._damageReceived=wrapper.readInt();this._shiftsWorked=wrapper.readInt();this._kills=wrapper.readInt();this._deaths=wrapper.readInt();this._arrests=wrapper.readInt();this._isAggressive=wrapper.readBoolean();this._gangName=wrapper.readString();this._healthLevel=wrapper.readInt();// --- NEW FIELDS: MUST MATCH SERVER SEND ORDER ---
this._jobTitle=wrapper.readString();this._corporationName=wrapper.readString();this._corporationIconUrl=wrapper.readString();this._gangId=wrapper.readInt();this._gangIconKey=wrapper.readString();this._gangPrimaryColor=wrapper.readString();this._gangSecondaryColor=wrapper.readString();return true;}get userId(){return this._userId;}get username(){return this._username;}get figure(){return this._figure;}get health(){return this._health;}get maxHealth(){return this._maxHealth;}get energy(){return this._energy;}get maxEnergy(){return this._maxEnergy;}get hunger(){return this._hunger;}get maxHunger(){return this._maxHunger;}get aggressionMs(){return this._aggressionMs;}get xp(){return this._xp;}get maxXP(){return this._maxXP;}get strength(){return this._strength;}get level(){return this._level;}get points(){return this._points;}get stamina(){return this._stamina;}get hungerLevel(){return this._hungerLevel;}get gatheringLevel(){return this._gatheringLevel;}get defense(){return this._defense;}// aliases in the style used elsewhere
get gathering(){return this._gatheringLevel;}get healthlevel(){return this._healthLevel;}get punchesThrown(){return this._punchesThrown;}get punchesLanded(){return this._punchesLanded;}get damageDealt(){return this._damageDealt;}get damageReceived(){return this._damageReceived;}get shiftsWorked(){return this._shiftsWorked;}get kills(){return this._kills;}get deaths(){return this._deaths;}get arrests(){return this._arrests;}// aliases for profile payload naming
get punches(){return this._punchesThrown;}get damageGiven(){return this._damageDealt;}get isAggressive(){return this._isAggressive;}get gangName(){return this._gangName;}get healthLevel(){return this._healthLevel;}// --- NEW: employment + gang visuals ---
get jobTitle(){return this._jobTitle;}get corporationName(){return this._corporationName;}get corporationIconUrl(){return this._corporationIconUrl;}get gangId(){return this._gangId;}get gangIconKey(){return this._gangIconKey;}get gangPrimaryColor(){return this._gangPrimaryColor;}get gangSecondaryColor(){return this._gangSecondaryColor;}}
